entries.label: Activity Start Date:  (Start of Construction Date)
Activity End Date:  (End of Construction Date)
Stabilization Start Date: (Date that seed or mat was placed within 14 days of activity completed)
Stabilization Complete Date:  (Once the site is 70% stabilized)

Reasons for changes (If changes to the SWPPP are required list the reasons. EX:  the area required additional BMP placements.  Project was bored instead of plowed/trenched SWPPP is no longer required)

"I certify under penalty of law that this document and all attachments such as Inspection Form were prepared under my direction or supervision in accordance with a system designed to ensure that qualified personnel properly gather and evaluate the information submitted. Based on my inquiry of the person or persons who manage the system, or those persons directly responsible for gathering the information, the information submitted is, to the best of my knowledge and belief, true, accurate, and complete. I am aware that there are significant penalties for submitting false information, including the possibility of fine and imprisonment for knowing violations."
Signature of Responsible or Cognizant Official:

entry_values.text: 1 - System operating as designed - No issues
2 - System operating as designed - Maintenance needed
3 - System operating as designed - Minor repairs needed
4 - System not operating as designed - Major repairs needed
5 - System not operating as designed - Safety issues and major repairs needed

entries.label: Corrective action/other remarks:  (Ex. Silt fence needs to be replace; Additional silt fence needed)
